ocr.text: The table presents data on gene expression involving various gene IDs, their descriptions, and read counts for MTX and RTX.
The first row, Tb927.8.3620, with the description "Folate transporter, putative," has MTX reads of 387.4a and RTX reads of
425.6a. The second row, Tb927.8.3650, also a "Folate transporter, putative," shows MTX reads at 190.1a and RTX reads at
139.4a. In the third row, Tb927.8.3630, another "Folate transporter, putative," displays MTX reads of 107.0a and RTX reads of
125.5a. The fourth entry, Tb11.v5.0766, described as a "Folate transporter, putative (truncated)," has MTX reads of 85.4a and
RTX reads of 78.9a.
